name: trick-or-treat-a-history-of-halloween
description: Lisa Morton's Trick or Treat: A History of Halloween — a cultural history tracing Halloween from Celtic Samhain through Roman and Christian influences to its American evolution as a secular community celebration of costumes, candy, and the supernatural.
useCase: Understand two thousand years of Halloween history — from Celtic spirits to American candy, the traditions that survived and the ones that didn't.
knownRisks: Some historical details about pre-Christian Celtic practices are based on limited evidence
The book focuses on American/Western Halloween — limited coverage of global celebrations
Halloween's commercialization is treated neutrally — not a deep critique of consumer culture
